summary: Verified production-fix + VLM fallback feature. /api/health exposes ml_available, damage_model, parts_model, vlm_available. /api/analyze returns damages enriched with 'part_source' (yolo/vlm/none) and a 'vlm_enhanced' count. On crash_6.jpg, 4 damages detected and 2 of them were enhanced by GPT-4o VLM (Arka Tampon, Kaput). PDF, history list, detail, and quality-check endpoints all work. Frontend renders purple 'VLM' badge correctly next to part_tr.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1259 lines - exceeds 700-line threshold; consider splitting analysis/training/compare routers into separate modules.

MONGO_URL has a hardcoded fallback default in server.py line 78 ('mongodb://localhost:27017/autodamageid') - per env rules, defaults should be omitted so missing config fails fast. Same for DB_NAME (line 79).

vlm_parts_fallback.py imports inside function (emergentintegrations) which is fine for optionality, but errors are swallowed broadly; consider distinguishing API key missing vs. transient failure for better observability.

analyses_collection.find().sort().limit() in /api/analyses returns image_base64 implicitly excluded only via the listed-fields dict comprehension; ensure large payloads aren't streamed. (Current code looks OK - listing endpoint maps fields.)
PARTS_TR table is duplicated between server.py and vlm_parts_fallback.py - DRY violation; extract to a shared constants module.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (upload -> analyze -> result with VLM badges -> history all working)

seed_data_creation: Multiple analyses were created during testing using /app/assets/crash_1.jpg and crash_6.jpg
context_for_next_testing_agent: VLM fallback is fully functional. crash_6.jpg reliably produces 2 VLM-enhanced damages out of 4. Health endpoint exposes vlm_available which reflects EMERGENT_LLM_KEY presence. Each damage carries 'part_source' in {yolo, vlm, none}; VLM-enhanced damages additionally have vlm_confidence (>=0.5) and vlm_reasoning. Frontend renders VLM. PDF endpoint /api/analyses/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF (magic header %PDF). MongoDB _id is not leaked in API responses.

features_verified.analyze_part_source: PASS - all damages have part_source in {yolo, vlm, none}
features_verified.vlm_metadata: PASS - VLM-enhanced damages have part, part_tr, vlm_confidence>=0.5
features_verified.analyses_list_persistence: PASS - GET /api/analyses returns recently created analysis
features_verified.analyses_detail: PASS - GET /api/analyses/{id} returns full data without MongoDB _id leak
features_verified.pdf_download: PASS - returns application/pdf with %PDF magic bytes
features_verified.frontend_load: PASS - Turkish UI loads correctly at root URL
features_verified.frontend_vlm_badge: PASS - 2 purple 'VLM' badges visible on result page for crash_6.jpg
